summary: Tested the critical bug fix: selections (event type dropdown, role buttons) no longer reset when typing in other fields. Both ReservationForm and SocioForm use inlined JSX variables instead of sub-components, preventing React unmount/remount. All 10 test scenarios passed.
seed_data_creation: Created test reservation 'Ana Martinez' Quinceañera Q5000 Confirmado 2026-06-15
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified: formFields in ReservationForm.jsx and socioFields/photoBlock in SocioForm.jsx are now inlined JSX variables (not sub-components). Selections persist across keystrokes. Design is 'Glass Aurora' fullscreen layout.
